name: Emeril's Roasted Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place the garlic bulbs on a sheet of aluminum foil.
3. Drizzle with olive oil, then sprinkle with salt and essence.
4. Fold the edges of the foil to form a tent.
5. Roast for about 40 minutes until tender.
6. Let cool slightly, then squeeze the cloves out of the bulb.
7. Make a paste by crushing the cloves.
This recipe keeps refrigerated in the olive oil for up to 2-3 days.
